prompt:
Generate a magazine editorial advertisement for DuberyMNL, recreating the visual concept shown in CONCEPT_IMAGE -- a 'This Is Eye-Tech' style feature spread adapted for DuberyMNL sunglasses.

FORMAT: Vertical 9:16 portrait. Clean pure white background throughout.

TYPOGRAPHY LAYOUT (top section):
- Small tag line at the very top in light grey uppercase: 'BE THE STYLE'
- Large editorial headline below it, mixing bold and regular weight: 'This Is' (light weight, italic) + 'Polarized' (bold, large) -- similar typographic treatment to the concept image headline
- Small body copy beneath the headline (2 lines, small font, grey): 'DuberyMNL sunglasses feature polarized lenses and UV400 protection built for everyday life outdoors.'

PRODUCT ARRANGEMENT (center and lower section):
Three sunglasses displayed large, staggered diagonally across the frame -- overlapping and at dramatic angles, exactly like the concept image:

1. OUTBACK GREEN (upper area, angled tilted to the right): matte black chunky wayfarer frame, vivid green-teal mirrored polarized lenses, small green accent tab on the arm. Must match PRODUCT_REF_1 exactly. Display large, slightly tilted clockwise.

2. RASTA RED (center, nearly horizontal): matte black frame, fire orange-red mirrored lenses, rasta stripe band (red/yellow/green) on temple arms, circular logo badge on arm. Must match PRODUCT_REF_2 exactly. Display large, nearly flat/horizontal across the center.

3. BANDITS MATTE BLACK (lower area, angled tilted to the left): matte black frame, gold-yellow mirrored lenses, colorful abstract inner temple pattern. Must match PRODUCT_REF_3 exactly. Display large, slightly tilted counter-clockwise.

All three products overlap slightly at their edges, creating depth. Products are photorealistic, sharp, pristine -- arms open, lenses catching soft studio light.

FEATURE CALLOUT ANNOTATIONS:
Small editorial annotation labels with fine hairline rules (thin lines) pointing to each product -- similar to the concept image's callout style:
- Pointing to Outback Green: small bold label 'POLARIZED LENSES' with 1-line descriptor: 'Blocks 99% of UV rays'
- Pointing to Rasta Red: small bold label 'UV400 PROTECTION' with 1-line descriptor: 'Made for the view'
- Pointing to Bandits Matte Black: small bold label 'LIGHTWEIGHT FRAME' with 1-line descriptor: 'All-day comfort'

BRAND LOGO:
Place the DuberyMNL logo (LOGO_IMAGE) in the bottom center or bottom-right of the composition. Reproduce faithfully: red square D icon + bold italic DUBERY wordmark + MNL. Small and refined, like a magazine brand footer.

MOOD:
Clean, premium, editorial. Feels like a page from a lifestyle magazine -- Esquire or GQ Philippines. White space is deliberate. The products are the hero.

QUALITY: Crisp editorial photography quality. Products sharp and photorealistic against the pure white background. Typography clean and legible.
